source
***
The function iterates through each integer within the provided slice to compute required values.
***
Initial variables track the running total for squares and the cumulative product for cubes.
***
An empty input list triggers specific return values of zero for the sum and one for the product.
***
Each number gets squared and added to the total while its cube multiplies into the product.
***
The final result combines both calculated metrics into a single ordered pair structure.
***
